allow: PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessName -match 'whisper|python|ollama|node|ggml|llama|faster|whispercpp|transcrib' } | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, @{Name='RAM\(MB\)';Expression={[math]::Round\($_.WorkingSet64/1MB,1\)}}, CPU | Sort-Object 'RAM\(MB\)' -Descending | Format-Table -AutoSize)
